sections.paragraph:
Original: אות

Transliteration: 'ôth

Phonetic: oth

BDB Definition:

  1. sign, signal
    1. a distinguishing mark
    2. banner
    3. remembrance
    4. miraculous sign
    5. omen
    6. warning
  2. token, ensign, standard, miracle, proof

Origin: probably from H225 (in the sense of appearing)

TWOT entry: 41a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
